text_block_list.text:
With a fantastic performance in the Twinkle
Series, Mihono Bourbon has had an impressive
first three years.
One peaceful day, after reaching that milestone...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to come with me to visit my
family?

I end up accompanying Mihono Bourbon to her
parents' house.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I asked you to come for two reasons.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
First, my father is always saying that he wants to
meet you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now that our race schedule has settled down, I
have determined that there are no problems with
being away from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The other reason is...
She stops mid-sentence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: There is a matter that I must verify.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...We will arrive at the closest station to my home
soon. Please make preparations to disembark.

She takes me to a simple house in the remote
countryside.
A kind-looking man is waiting at the entrance.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: Welcome home, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Father. Please meet my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
I've heard so much about you. Thank you for
taking care of my daughter.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I couldn't come to the academy to meet
you. Our house is a bit small, but please make
yourself at home.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Here is the souvenir you requested, Father.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you. So, this is that special carrot
bread everyone's talking about...

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
Please, make yourself at home. I'll go get you
something to drink.

I look around the room and see a photo of a very
young Mihono Bourbon displayed on a shelf.

She's holding a flag with "#1" written on it, and
flashing a peace sign at the camera, all while
maintaining a poker face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to my data logs, this is a photo of the
first time I ever finished in first place in a race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It was just after I decided I wanted to win the
Classic Triple Crown. I recall feeling "elated" at
the time.

The room is adorned with other trophies and
medals, as well as old caricatures she drew.

An old ticket for the Japanese Derby in particular
catches my attention.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is... unknown. It was not here before.

She tilts her head in confusion as her father
returns with a tray of tea.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
It's a ticket stub from when I took Bourbon to the
Japanese Derby for the first time.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
Since she's been gone, I've been digging out
things like this. I'm a bit of an old sop, I have to
admit...
choice_data_list: It must be important to you.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
It was after Bourbon watched the race that day
that she said she wanted to be a Triple Crown
champion.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you know, but she's not really the type to
go around expressing her desires.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
So I couldn't have been happier. We started
training together after that.

I remember Bourbon telling me that her father
started training her when she was young.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Father was a trainer, so I have run exhaustive
routines since youth. In other words, I am used to
it.

Thanks to the habits she's maintained since a
young age, she has the physical strength and
mental fortitude to endure tough training.

As I excitedly go on and on about how beneficial
that training turned out to be for Mihono
Bourbon, her father scratches his head bashfully.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: I really didn't do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text: More important is what you have done for her. I've been wanting to thank you.
choice_data_list: I'm the one who hasn't done anything spec—
I'm the one who hasn't done anything spec—

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
No. You turned racing into something more than
just a Triple Crown dream for her.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her cry those tears of joy at the Arima
Kinen while the crowd went wild...

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
I may have only seen it on TV, but I'll never forget
it for as long as I live.

text_block_list.name: Bourbon's Father
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for taking care of my
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Father...

We relax for a little while after that and then
leave.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for meeting my father,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is rare for him to be so talkative. He must have
been very happy.
choice_data_list:
By the way, what was it that you needed to
verify?

text_block_list.text:
On our way here, Mihono Bourbon said that there
was a matter that she needed to verify.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is... well... the difference between you and
my father.

I can't help but ask her to elaborate after hearing
such an unexpected response.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I used to believe that you were similar to my
father.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You both treat my dream with respect, and you
have both walked with me on my path to achieve
it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, after the Arima Kinen, I felt that I may
have been mistaken.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My emotions rose beyond expected levels on that
day as I returned to your side.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have realized that my emotional state has
gained some degree of volatility since I met you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This emotional volatility feels pleasant, and has
become a factor in making my life feel more
enriched...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I realized this... It's difficult to express, but
I felt that you were different from my father.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Today, I... wanted to verify that feeling.
choice_data_list: And what did you find out?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The two of you are similar in many ways. You
both believe in me and continue to stick with me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, there is certainly a difference. I cannot
explain it sufficiently, but...
She looks at me straight in the eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You are my trainer and I cherish the time we
spend together greatly.

It could just be the light of the sunset, but her
cheeks turn slightly red.

It feels like my journey with Mihono Bourbon has
started anew.
